usage: define_glitch_holding_resistance [-help] [-glitch_type {both vl vh vlu vho vl_vh vlu_vho}] [-instance_pin <string>] [-lib_pin <string>] -value <float> [-views <string>]

options.name: -glitch_type
options.description: {both vl vh vlu vho vl_vh vlu_vho} specifies the glitch type for rHold application

options.name: -instance_pin
options.description: specify list of instance pin names

options.name: -lib_pin
options.description: specify list of library pin names

options.name: -value
options.description: specify the value in ohms of the holding resistance to be used by glitch analysis

options.name: -views
options.description: specify the list of view names
